name: WF8b - Social Post Platform Publishing
note: Hardened 2026-07-17: webhook auth, IG container→publish, FB message field, mediaUrl, flatten fix, post-result gating.

parameters.content:
## WF8b — Social publish (hardened)

Requires `N8N_WEBHOOK_TOKEN` on incoming webhooks and `NEXUS_APP_URL` + `N8N_INGEST_TOKEN` for app callbacks.

Terminal status is written via `POST /api/internal/n8n/post-result` only after all platform calls succeed.
